overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a foggy, dark forest at night before emerging into a clearer grassy hillside. The atmosphere shifts from enclosed, misty woods with bare trees to open rolling hills under a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest path with bare trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a narrow forest path, carrying swords on his back, navigating through foggy woods with low visibility

entered.detail: tall leafless trees creating dense dark canopy on left side of path
tall leafless trees creating dense dark canopy on right side of path
narrow winding dirt trail cutting through the dark forest
thick blue-green tinted fog reducing visibility throughout the forest
small dark wooden shack with sloped roof beside the path, visible around 10s

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a dense, foggy forest at night, following a narrow dirt path surrounded by bare trees. The visibility is low due to thick blue-tinted atmospheric fog, and he passes a small wooden hut on the left side of the path around the 10-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy hillside trail under clear night sky

events.description: exits dense foggy forest into open grassland with clear visibility and visible sky
ambient light increases significantly as fog clears, revealing starry night sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along a winding path through open grass-covered hills, moving uphill away from the forest

entered.detail: rolling green grass-covered hills extending into the distance
rolling green grass-covered hills with scattered rocks
narrow trail winding through tall green grass
dark blue night sky visible with stars and no fog
grey rock formation emerging from the grassy hillside

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to open grassy hills as Geralt emerges from the foggy forest. The sky becomes visible and clear, showing stars against a dark blue night. He continues walking along a narrow trail through the green grass-covered terrain, with rocky outcrops visible on the hillsides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, misty woodland that gradually opens into a vast, starry hillside. It begins with Geralt navigating a narrow dirt path through a dense forest, where thick blue-tinted fog and bare trees severely limit visibility. As he passes a small wooden hut on the left, the oppressive canopy begins to thin and the atmospheric haze lifts. The scene then expands as he emerges from the tree line into open, green grassy hills under a clear, dark blue night sky filled with stars. Finally, the camera follows him along a narrow trail that winds through the rolling terrain and past scattered rocky outcrops.
